clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. They’ll Never Take Our Freedom 🗽 Sometimes it takes a day like July 4 for us to stop, think, and appreciate what it truly means to be an American. Living in this country is a blessing, and every day I am proud to fight for the principles our founding fathers laid out: Equality. Liberty. Opportunity. Lately, these fundamental rights are threatened – not just from foreign enemies – but from liberal activists and even members of Congress who want to undermine our nation’s history and character. Cong. Ilhan Omar just doubled down on America to terrorist groups. Athlete Gwen Berry her back on our national anthem. Radical progressives are to force schools to teach our children to hate America. My response? Haters gonna hate. The American Dream is alive and well. We’re not perfect. And we don’t claim to be. But we sure are trying. Americans have tried to do better for 245 years, and we’ll keep trying. That’s part of the American spirit. But I sure as heck am not going to let spoiled activists tell me that America is evil. America is the freest, greatest nation on Earth, and that’s what I’m celebrating this weekend. Thanks for being a supporter, a fellow patriot, and a partner in preserving everything that makes our country great! Happy Fourth of July. | | Local Celebrations 🇺🇸 What a way to kick off our Independence Day celebrations! Uncle Sam showed up to greet Chancellor Heagerty and myself at the Town of Farragut’s parade - pictured above. I also spoke at Knoxville's fireworks celebration on Friday and attended the daytime event at World’s Fair Park. Great to see the patriotic spirit alive and well in East Tennessee. | Just For Fun 🎉 → Kick off your July 4th with these star spangled s'mores 🍡 () → Test your July 4th knowledge with this quick quiz 🙋 () → Maybe don’t take your celebrations as far as this guy 🎆 () | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Mo Brooks
subject: Happy Independence Day, America!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
As we take time to celebrate and honor those brave men and women who risked life and limb in the founding of this country, I want to take a moment to reflect on what exactly makes America great.

| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july_4th&n=1)
---

| Peter, As we take time to celebrate and honor those brave men and women who risked life and limb in the founding of this country, I want to take a moment to reflect on what exactly makes America great. For me, America has been and always will be the greatest nation on Earth, as long as we as citizens do what we must do, just as our founders did for us. Americans enjoy a standard of living that is the envy of the world, and our military prowess is unprecedented. America is not great because we are lucky. America is great because our foundational principles set us on a path to freedom & prosperity, and by and large, we stuck to those principles. I’m proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish, and determined to do everything in my power to make this country even greater for future generations. Happy Independence Day, and God Bless America. Mo Brooks[****](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlt9-_NQpXQhGaqnLEIaEY8DfXMlReA-OTMgmkIOnK-VA&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july_4th&n=2 "Are you that 1-in-20?")

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Happy Independence Day!
body:
| | | | Yesterday and today, we are out parading across West Virginia and celebrating freedom.
---
---
Dear Peter,
Happy Independence Day!
Yesterday and today, we are out parading across West Virginia and celebrating freedom.
---
---
---
---
---
This is a special day to remember the values and principles which allowed our country to become free and made our nation great.
Enjoy!
Sincerely,
---
---
Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia

name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: It's Independence Day
body:
While we celebrate independence we still have a lot of work to do!

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4th_of_july_21_01&n=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: Happy Independence Day!!!
body:
** Happy Independence Day!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Happy Independence Day to you and your family!

America is truly a great & exceptional nation. The ideals in our Declaration of Independence - “that all men are created equal, that they are endowed by their Creator with certain unalienable Rights”- are amazing ideals to stand to uphold.

Independence Day is not only about freedom from another nation - Independence Day comes from an idea. It is a celebration of freedom from tyranny, totalitarian government control, and any philosophy that separates & divides people into immovable classes, and more...

America is not the land of division. America is the land of liberty, freedom, equal justice under the law, a free economy, intrinsic value for every human life, and so much more... I thank God for His provision & protection for America - in spite of our nation’s challenges - and I look forward to many years more! I have tremendous hope and faith in God for America’s future. America’s best days are still ahead! Let’s celebrate!

#BeBold

God bless you, & God bless America.

- Jerry, Lisa, & Michael Evans

Please check out my website (https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=39c49dbdfb&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and my vision (https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=fc547a582d&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey.

name: Josh Harder
subject: How far we’ve come since last 4th of July
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CureqGpN2zzNZB5u-Fi8qyDBcsyudqqwkKrFuFYemxs=/Ua1-spVjqPTHEEKFo0N48NI1g9C16hH813fsrVCs2qM=?refcode=E10047-20210704-4th-header-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hi Peter, happy 4th of July! Today I'm excited to be celebrating the 4th with family and friends. I'm thinking back to this time last year. How there was so much uncertainty with the pandemic and we couldn't even go out and see fireworks with our neighbors. That's why I am so thankful for the leadership of President Biden and Vice President Harris, who have made it possible for this year to be different. We have vaccines in arms and life is getting back to some kind of normal. I'm under no illusion that we can just go back to pre-pandemic thinking. We've lost too many and the scars of isolation will linger. But as we get ready tonight to go out and watch fireworks, I also think it's important to be grateful for the immense progress we've made. So today we take a breath, but not a break. We celebrate our freedoms and our independence, we honor those who are serving abroad or couldn't be with us, and may we never take our freedoms or democracy for granted. I hope you have a wonderful Independence Day! Josh [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/CureqGpN2zzNZB5u-Fi8qyDBcsyudqqwkKrFuFYemxs=/Ua1-spVjqPTHEEKFo0N48NI1g9C16hH813fsrVCs2qM=?refcode=E10047-20210704-4th-SB-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

| Greetings!
I wanted to send a quick note today with THANKS for a great fundraising quarter that just ended. Campaigns tend to invest a lot in the ask but I want to step back and say thank you for allowing me to take this journey. Without your support, I could not work to defend this great nation as a Candidate for Congress.
We have a fight on our hands to preserve this nation. I am actively engaged in the defense of America.
I dislike the constant emails soliciting campaign donations. But, I am happy to give generously to good leaders and I understand how important it is and I am glad that you are also. I know that many people do not have another way that they can contribute other than through donations.
So, thank you! I really appreciate it.
Jerrod America-First Republican Candidate for Congress Eastern Washington (WA-04)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Royer?=
subject: on this Independence Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/857b83d6aa84/on-this-independence-day?e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=c60e27ca2a&e=76fc145c69)
---
| |
---
| Folks -

Over the past few years, it was increasingly difficult to celebrate the 4th of July. Patriotism, the Flag, and what it means to “be an American” were very much co-opted by white nationalists, groups of people who used greed, hate, racism, and bigotry to define what the United States stood for. The majority of people would disagree with them but it still doesn’t make it any easier to determine someone’s intentions these days when they wave the Flag.
---
|
---
| I still find myself having trouble finding what this day truly means or if it is really worth celebrating. It makes you realize that there are groups of people who may have never felt that pride that many of us had felt more disassociated with over the past few years. It makes you realize that even though our President may have changed, it still takes intentionality to make sure that all are welcome, even those who may disagree with you. It’s not enough to put signs up and speak within echo chambers. You have to help make that space in the term “American” truly for everyone who wants to be here.

I have said this before and will say it every year, the most patriotic thing you can do is to help improve your country.

When you care about something, you want to work to improve it and that sometimes means criticizing it. Whether it’s your community, your Party, or your country, working to improve it and make it work better for everyone is the best thing you can do. And that’s what activists, organizers, candidates, and elected officials do every day because bringing everyone’s ideas together make it harder to miss things.

It’s time to take back what is patriotic and who is an American as we work with one another over the next 4 years. Time to open the doors, make space at the table, and truly build back better because we have the freedom to do that.

Still proud to be an American. Have a happy and safe 4th.

---
| [HELP OUT](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e5efe4512d&e=76fc145c69 "HELP OUT")

body:
Anything helps.
[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNUNtugzAM_Rp4AzkXCDzwsK3tb6A0Dm2mBKJchvr3C121zbJs6dg-9jFOVA1UqdpMFCgBAZwyTmFoSXvuu_PICIDo4NQTXnHYzdritkqLnylk51u1ufo-XfVSjA6AA2hgohPkqoREYAQJ46q20z0lHyv2VtFL8X3f25i930KKOSzRoG63cDuK7JKTm51Gk13FTtpJY-f7UtH-wOOWg9IFd2peZfEXrqTz0tzWUnnpYPNit2BQNkFbo5dGxmhimv-fP0f5paXTwahfom1Nek2F52hMelb-EWJZVIcJ_W6sNbEX5RW347Cn_rLamuUxVeK9ojRngyU9pVKpyy8QoOk0qIbz_toMgowNHSQg4jj2Izma6UeJ6eH13-QPafvUf6Di9A0JoIhf)

Friend,

My thoughts and prayers are with all of those impacted by the building collapse in Surfside, Florida.

I am reaching out to you now to ask you to please join our effort to help victims affected by this terrible tragedy.

To assist disaster relief efforts in Surfside, Florida, I am encouraging you to contribute to the Support Surfside Fund [by visiting the website](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNUNtugzAM_Rp4AzkXCDzwsK3tb6A0Dm2mBKJchvr3C121zbJs6dg-9jFOVA1UqdpMFCgBAZwyTmFoSXvuu_PICIDo4NQTXnHYzdritkqLnylk51u1ufo-XfVSjA6AA2hgohPkqoREYAQJ46q20z0lHyv2VtFL8X3f25i930KKOSzRoG63cDuK7JKTm51Gk13FTtpJY-f7UtH-wOOWg9IFd2peZfEXrqTz0tzWUnnpYPNit2BQNkFbo5dGxmhimv-fP0f5paXTwahfom1Nek2F52hMelb-EWJZVIcJ_W6sNbEX5RW347Cn_rLamuUxVeK9ojRngyU9pVKpyy8QoOk0qIbz_toMgowNHSQg4jj2Izma6UeJ6eH13-QPafvUf6Di9A0JoIhf) below.

**[Please contribute to the Support Surfside Fund.>>](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNUNtugzAM_Rp4AzkXCDzwsK3tb6A0Dm2mBKJchvr3C121zbJs6dg-9jFOVA1UqdpMFCgBAZwyTmFoSXvuu_PICIDo4NQTXnHYzdritkqLnylk51u1ufo-XfVSjA6AA2hgohPkqoREYAQJ46q20z0lHyv2VtFL8X3f25i930KKOSzRoG63cDuK7JKTm51Gk13FTtpJY-f7UtH-wOOWg9IFd2peZfEXrqTz0tzWUnnpYPNit2BQNkFbo5dGxmhimv-fP0f5paXTwahfom1Nek2F52hMelb-EWJZVIcJ_W6sNbEX5RW347Cn_rLamuUxVeK9ojRngyU9pVKpyy8QoOk0qIbz_toMgowNHSQg4jj2Izma6UeJ6eH13-QPafvUf6Di9A0JoIhf)**

Thank you to the incredible First Responders and Law Enforcement for arriving so quickly on the job, as always. We wish Governor Ron DeSantis, and all of those representing the Great State of Florida concerning this tragic event, good luck, and Godspeed.

clean_body: Anything helps. Friend, My thoughts and prayers are with all of those impacted by the building collapse in Surfside, Florida. I am reaching out to you now to ask you to please join our effort to help victims affected by this terrible tragedy. To assist disaster relief efforts in Surfside, Florida, I am encouraging you to contribute to the Support Surfside Fund below. Thank you to the incredible First Responders and Law Enforcement for arriving so quickly on the job, as always. We wish Governor Ron DeSantis, and all of those representing the Great State of Florida concerning this tragic event, good luck, and Godspeed. I am with you all the way! Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC.
